title: NYCT R40/R40M/R42
description: NYCT R40, R40M, and R42 for MTR4
body:
This pack adds the NYCT R40, R40M, and R42 to Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR4). Both models are included in their post-GOH configuration.

**NEW IN VERSION B:** Full-size versions of both are available!

NOTE: Side rollsigns do not work in this version.
